Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Elena And Sonny Oberes Supplemental Responses, Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Zachary D. Webster, Esq., (415) 673-5600, appearing for Teresita A. Carian, Plaintiff
Robert P. Weiss, Esq., (415) 655-9753, appearing for Sonny and Elena Oberes, Defendant

ARGUED. Mr. Weiss stated that he contested the tentative ruling, provided case background, objected sanctions and the privilege logs. Mr. Webster responded that sanctions are mandatory and concurred about the privilege logs.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the modified tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TERESITA CARIAN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Elena And Sonny Oberes Supplemental Responses, Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $3,925.00 to be paid within 30 days unless parties agree to some other date. Further responses to Requests 10,14, 22, 26 and 33 to be produced no later than December 4, 2020. Responses must be verified. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Elena And Sonny Oberes Supplemental Responses, Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Continued To Dec-01-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ZACH D. WEBSTER, Esq. of Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad, Harris & McSparran, LLP (Tel: 415-673-5600) for Plaintiff Teresita A. Carian;
Atty. ROBERT PETER WEISS, Esq. of McLaughlin Sanchez LLP (Tel: 415-655-9753) for Defendants Sonny Oberes and Elena Oberes.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF TERESITA CARIAN's Motion To Compel Defendants Elena And Sonny Oberes Supplemental Responses, Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions.

Defense counsel does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem.

Matter discussed.

Matter is continued to December 1, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 501, the Real Property/Housing Court.

Judge Pro Tem to prepare a report and recommendation.

Plaintiff's counsel to email a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at klgallo@discoveryreferee.com regarding the parties' voluntary participation in judicial settlement.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
